signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Defenders with this ability are granted a free pass rush move once per play after spending stamina to perform one
Defenders with this ability do not need to spend stamina on shed attempts during a run play
Defenders with this ability can reach out of engaged blocks to tackle or sack nearby ballcarriers.
RAC receivers fight for every possible yard after making a catch. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their success rate on RAC catches against single coverage.
Players with this ability will frequently win impact blocks against defensive backs.
When in the red zone, receivers with this ability have a better chance to win contested catches against single coverage.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes 20+ yards from the LoS, outside the numbers
Defenders with this ability force more catch knockouts and react quicker in any mid-field zone coverage, less than 20 yards from the LoS inside the numbers and 10-20 outside.
Defenders with this ability can still tackle effectively while trying to strip the football.
Momentum Shift players demoralize their opponents. When they enter the zone, all on field opponents are knocked out of the zone or lose any progress towards entering the zone.
Defenders with this ability can still tackle effectively while trying to strip the football.
Defenders with this ability use faster, more dominant pass rush moves while rushing from the edge of the defense.
Defenders with this ability use faster run shed moves for a better chance at shedding blocks against outside zone plays.
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while run blocking.
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while pass blocking.
Defenders with this ability will ignore one bar of blocker resistance when attempting spin pass rush moves
Defenders with this ability can still tackle effectively while trying to strip the football.
Defenders with this ability do not need to spend stamina on shed attempts during a run play
Passers with this ability have faster passing animations when they are throwing under pressure
Passers with this ability improve the catching prowess of all tight ends who are open on pass plays.
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all throws outside the numbers (except on high/low throws).
Ballcarriers with this ability have more powerful truck and stiff arm animations and a larger timing window for perfect attempts.
When lined up in the slot, receivers with this ability make faster cuts and have better hands when catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS
Players with this ability will frequently win impact blocks against defensive backs.
Wrecking Ball runners don't avoid contact. They create it. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their success rate on trucks and stiff arms.
Running Backs with this ability receive improved blocking from their O-Line within 5 yards of the end zone
Ballcarriers with this ability will cause increased fatigue penalties against their tackler when tackled via a non-conservative tackle.
Ballcarriers with this ability have an increased chance to break the first tackle attempt on kick returns
Players with this ability are harder to knock out of The Zone
Defenders with this ability are rarely faked out by ballcarrier moves (and cannot be faked out when user-controlled).
Defenders with this ability have better conservative/dive tackling, are rarely faked out by ballcarrier moves, and cannot be faked out when user-controlled.
